purpose: Counterfactual tracker - the memory of the road not taken. EVERY decision NOT to act (veto, skip, rejection) and every exit (stop-loss, sell) is recorded here with the price at decision time. The weekly review checks what those stocks did afterward and grades whether the decision was right.

entry_format.decision: QUALITY_VETO | COMMITTEE_REJECT | MACRO_SKIP | CAP_SKIP | STOP_LOSS | SELL_SIGNAL | EXIT_TRIGGER | SIGNAL_DEFER_DATA_UNAVAILABLE | SHADOW_CONGRESS

entries.source: Congress: Capitol Trades (bff.capitoltrades.com 503, www.capitoltrades.com Vercel, jina.ai 429, quiverquant login)
entries.reasoning: All 4 congress data endpoints blocked (infrastructure failure); demoted to shadow tracking per charter amendment v2 (post-2012 evidence ≈ zero edge). Portfolio: $0 capital allocated. If sources resume, grading will track counterfactual.

entries.source: OpenInsider.com Latest Cluster Buys (analyzed 100 most recent filings)
entries.reasoning: Scanned openinsider.com cluster-buy data published 2026-07-01 to 2026-07-13. Findings: 8 entries (IPX, GLOO, UUUU, VIRC, SWZ, FTECX, VFLEX, YPF) were closed-end funds or non-US tickers or price <$5 (ineligible). Remaining 92 of top 100 were older (pre-2026-07-01) or also failed eligibility (price <$5, non-US, or CEFs). No new US common stock cluster-buy candidates (2+ distinct insiders, $25k+ each, price >$5) published between last_run 2026-07-11 and today 2026-07-13. Defer action, re-scan Monday 2026-07-21.
